ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the instrument */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "metals_unscaled" REAL /* Unscaled value of metals */,
  "metals_monthly" REAL /* Monthly value of metals */,
  "isPartial" INTEGER /* Indicator of partial data */,
  "scale" REAL /* Scaling factor */,
  "metals" REAL /* Scaled value of metals */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the instrument */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the instrument's value */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "instrument_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., metals, currencies) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_types" (
  "market_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market type */,
  "market_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the market type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market type entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market type entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market the instrument belongs to */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpis" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the KPI */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the KPI */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the KPI */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the KPI */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the KPI was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the KPI was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
